case_title: WILLIAM S. RAKOCY VS. JUDITH M. SMITH

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2013 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAKOCY, WILLIAM S. AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, JUDITH M.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAKOCY, WILLIAM S. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SMITH, JUDITH M. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $209.00 FILED BY RAKOCY, WILLIAM S. AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, JUDITH M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-12-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-12-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
